title: convolvulus pseudoscammonia
intro: Convolvulus pseudoscammonia, also known as the Japanese morning glory, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia and the Pacific islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valued remedy in herbal medicine. Convolvulus pseudoscammonia is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
